data.title: Battalion Oil Increases Compression Capacity, Building on Previously Announced Midstream Reliability
data.description: Battalion Oil has increased its sour gas compression at Monument Draw by 50%, raising the capacity to over 50 million cubic feet per day (MMcfd). This enhancement will facilitate near-term production growth expected to be achieved by the third quarter of 2026.

data.title: Z Squared to Acquire Skycore Digital, Adding 24 MW of Energized AI Infrastructure with Expansion Path to 42 MW
data.description: Z Squared, Inc. (Nasdaq: ZSQR), a digital infrastructure company based in FORT LAUDERDALE, Florida, will be ringing the closing bell at Nasdaq MarketSite on April 29, 2026. The Company recently disclosed that it has signed a binding letter of agreement.

data.title: Lennox Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: In the latest financial report, Lennox announced a 6% increase in revenue, reaching $1.1 billion. However, there was a 3% decrease in GAAP operating income, amounting to $164 million. GAAP diluted EPS also saw a decline of 8%, standing at $3.35. Despite these changes, Lennox is keeping its full-year EPS guidance range steady at $23.50 - $25.00. This update was shared on April 29, 2026, in Dallas.

data.title: STARTRADER Transforms Basketball Court for 10,000 Youth Annually in Vietnam
data.description: STARTRADER has successfully completed the upgrade of a basketball court in HO CHI MINH CITY, Vietnam, improving facilities for approximately 10,000 young people every year. The revamped court is now being utilized for daily activities, offering a secure and organized setting for the youth to engage in sports, learn, and grow.

data.title: Navient posts first quarter 2026 financial results
data.description: On April 29, 2026, a financial services company based in Herndon, Virginia, Navient (Nasdaq: NAVI), released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. Interested parties can access the detailed financial information on Navient's website at Navient.com/investors. Additionally, the company will make the materials available on the SEC's website via a Form 8-K at www.sec.gov.

data.title: ADAS market worth $582.6 million units by 2033| MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, news released today indicates that the ADAS market is set to experience significant growth, with projections showing an increase from 361.4 million units in 2026 to 582.6 million units by 2033. This projection represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.1%. The report contains extensive market data, including 250 tables, 150 figures, spread across 500 pages, offering in-depth insights into this evolving industry.
Ukraine is ready to share its experience with European partners on protecting energy facilities from Russian attacks, said Energy Minister Shmygal.

data.title: TPG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: TPG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. (NYSE: MITT) released its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company expressed optimism despite economic challenges impacting industry book values. MITT emphasized its strategic capital rotation into high-return residential investments and efforts to enhance profitability at Arc Home. EAD for the quarter was reported at $0.26. The company remains focused on maintaining a disciplined leverage profile to navigate market volatility.
UAE Official: For multilateral organizations, UAE is revising the relevance and utility of its role and contribution across the board.
UAE Official: At this time, UAE is not considering any withdrawals.

data.title: Founder Alex Mashinsky settled FTC case with $10M payment, tied to $4.72B judgment based on asset disclosures.
data.description: Mashinsky has been ordered by the FTC to pay $10 million, with the payment linked to a $4.72 billion judgment, which is mostly suspended for now. This judgment could be reinstated based on the disclosure of assets.

data.title: Canada plans to ban crypto ATMs to combat scams and money laundering. Regulators target high-risk parts of crypto sector.
data.description: The Canadian government has highlighted that Bitcoin ATMs are increasingly being exploited by scammers, prompting regulatory efforts to enhance supervision of the high-risk segments within the cryptocurrency industry. Ottawa identified these ATMs as a significant tool for illicit activities, emphasizing the need for improved oversight.

data.title: Delivering an Open Data Center Ecosystem for AI
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on April 29, 2026, the Open Compute Project Foundation (OCP) is leading advancements in technology from chip design to grid management in data centers. This nonprofit organization focuses on bringing large-scale innovations and best practices to data centers globally. The OCP aims to revolutionize the industry by implementing cutting-edge solutions for both hyperscale and local data centers.

data.title: SOLAI Limited Announces Changes to Board of Directors
data.description: Akron, Ohio - Today, SOLAI Limited (NYSE: SLAI), previously known as "BTCM", a leading personal AI and digital infrastructure provider, revealed that Mr. Bo Yu has stepped down from his role as Chairman of the Board.

data.title: Graphic Packaging Holding Company signs 250-megawatt solar agreement with NextEra Energy Resources to advance renewable energy in Texas
data.description: Graphic Packaging Holding Company, a leading global provider of sustainable consumer packaging, revealed a virtual power purchase agreement following the accomplishment of its solar energy projects in Spain. This North American deal marks a significant milestone for the company. The announcement was made on April 29, 2026, and comes after the successful installation of solar energy systems backed by the company in Spain. Graphic Packaging Holding Company, listed on NYSE as GPK, has been actively engaged in promoting sustainable practices and aims to further expand its renewable energy initiatives.

data.title: CGI reports second quarter Fiscal 2026 results
data.description: The company with stock market symbols GIB.A on TSX and GIB on NYSE, available at cgi.com/newsroom, recently reported a revenue increase of 3.3% and a diluted EPS accretion of 10.6% in Q2 of the fiscal year 2026. Key performance highlights show revenue reaching $4.16 billion, representing a 3.3% increase year-over-year or 1.6% when adjusted for constant currency fluctuations. Earnings before income taxes amounted to $617.7 million.
